log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kobold — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kobold — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Kobold — Unarmored Caster HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Kobold — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 42/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
